channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: AI Jobs Fallout May Trigger Token Taxes, Big Safety Net Changes As Political Risks Mount
item.description: Public opposition is soaring even before AI is a net job killer. Elon Musk and other tech leaders are proposing safety net changes and AI token taxes to head off more-radical ideas.

item.title: Tesla EV Registrations In Europe Spike. The Stock Is Closing In On A Buy Point.
item.description: After two big down years, Tesla has easy comparisons in Europe. But up is up. Tesla stock is nearing a buy point.

item.title: Billionaire Phillipe Laffont Recently Sold Oracle, Tesla, and Nvidia and Purchased a Stock Down 94% Since Its IPO in 2020
item.description: Laffont's fund, Coatue Management, eliminated or reduced several of its notable tech and artificial intelligence positions in the first quarter of the year.

item.title: Tesla teases going Plaid Mode with the Model 3
item.description: Tesla Vice President of Vehicle Engineering, Lars Moravy, recently revealed the company has thought about introducing a Plaid powertrain on the Model 3, but there could be some challenges involved. On the Ride the Lightning podcast, Moravy revealed that he thinks about a Plaid Model 3 “all the ti...

item.title: Tesla Gains as Europe EV Sales Rise
item.description: Electric and hybrid demand helped lift April car registrations across the EU.

item.title: Tesla Stock Rises After Europe Deliveries Soar 46%
item.description: Tesla Sees Explosive Europe Growth as EV Registrations Jump 38%

item.title: Tesla Stock Is Rising Again. Europe EV Sales Are Helping This Time.
item.description: Helping were sales data from Europe that showed Tesla sold 10,654 cars in April, up 46.5% year over year. It’s been a strong year for European EV sales, amid higher oil prices. In 2025, Tesla sold 238,656 vehicles in Europe, down 26.9% year over year.

item.title: Prediction: Elon Musk Will Become the World’s First Trillionaire on June 12th
item.description: Here’s a prediction worth marking on the calendar: Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) CEO Elon Musk will become the world’s first trillionaire on June 12, the reported IPO date for SpaceX. The catalyst is easy to figure out: SpaceX’s public debut will, for the first time, place a continuously quoted market valu...

item.title: Elon Musk’s SpaceX Bitcoin Holdings Could Eclipse Public Companies After IPO Despite Tiny Valuation Share, Grayscale Says
item.description: More diversified companies are expected to adopt Bitcoin as part of treasury diversification and fiat currency hedging strategies, Grayscale’s Head of Research says.

item.title: Forget Tesla: This Cash-Rich Automotive Underdog Is A Value Buy
item.description: Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) is dominating every financial feed again after a 15.22% one-month rip back to $433.59, fueled by the same robotaxi and Optimus narrative that has powered the stock for years. But here’s what you should actually be watching. The Tesla Story Has a Quality Problem Tesla trades at...

item.title: TSLA Stock Gains As Tesla EV Registrations Soar In Europe — Ross Gerber Says 'High Gas Prices Work Their Magic'
item.description: According to data from the European Automobile Manufacturers’ Association, Tesla sold 9,169 cars in the European Union in April, up from 5,483 units in the same period a year ago.

item.title: Tesla vs. Alphabet: Who Wins the Autonomous AI Race?
item.description: Robotaxis may soon be a $10 trillion business.

item.title: Tesla (TSLA) and SpaceX merger would be Musk’s 4th billion-dollar self-deal
item.description: Elon Musk is reportedly floating the idea of merging Tesla (TSLA) and SpaceX, just weeks before SpaceX’s massive IPO on the Nasdaq. If it happens, this would literally be the fourth time Musk has orchestrated a billion-dollar transaction between companies he controls. No one in corporate America ...

item.title: NASA’s first human outpost on the Moon starts now – SpaceX on deck
item.description: NASA has laid out its most detailed Moon Base plan to date, describing a permanent outpost near the Moon’s south pole that the agency intends to build over the coming decade as a direct stepping stone to Mars. “The Moon Base will be America’s and humanity’s first outpost on another celestial worl...

item.title: Tesla Stock Rides SpaceX Hype: Trump Floats $20B Lunar Push, Musk Eyes 'Major' Moon Base
item.description: Musk fueled excitement by calling for a “major base on the Moon” and calling lunar and Martian colonies SpaceX’s “prime directive.”

item.title: Grayscale Reveals The One DAT That Could Beat MicroStrategy’s Bitcoin Treasury
item.description: Grayscale says SpaceX will be the largest diversified public Bitcoin holder after its June IPO with 18,712 BTC.

item.title: Tesla Logs Strong Growth in European Monthly Sales
item.description: In the EU alone, sales grew over 67%, a sign that Elon Musk’s EV maker continues to regain momentum in the region after a slump stretching more than a year.

item.title: Tesla Sales Have 'Bottomed,' Says Ross Gerber As Iran War-Driven Gas Price Spike Pushes More Drivers Toward EVs
item.description: Investor Ross Gerber thinks that the Iran war has had a positive impact on Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) sales as gas prices reach new highs, prompting an EV shift. Tesla Sales Have ‘Bottomed’ In a post on X, the Gerber Kawasaki co-founder said that the EV giant’s sales have “bottomed” and were “looki...

item.title: Micron Just Became America's 10th-Most-Valuable Company. Wall Street Says It Could Pass Tesla and Meta Next.
item.description: Surging demand for the memory chipmaker's AI products has sent its stock soaring. But a rally this steep doesn't come without risk.

item.title: Elon Musk Hits Back At Tesla Brand Damage Critics, Reaffirms Model Y's Sales Dominance
item.description: Tesla Inc. CEO Elon Musk on Monday hit back against concerns that his political activism has negatively affected the Tesla brand. Product >> Brand Quoting a post by user James Stephenson on X, who hailed the Tesla Model Y’s position...

item.title: SpaceX IPO — Boon Or Boondoggle?
item.description: SpaceX plans to go public next month. Will new investors see substantial gains or covering Elon's losses from his misadventures? The post SpaceX IPO — Boon Or Boondoggle?

item.title: Musk mulled combining Tesla and SpaceX - report
item.description: Investing.com -- Elon Musk has discussed with colleagues the possibility of combining SpaceX with Tesla, according to a CNBC report on Tuesday.

item.title: Tesla ‘Robotaxi’ fleet is actually shrinking, not growing, new data shows
item.description: Less than a month after we reported that Tesla’s unsupervised “Robotaxi” fleet was finally showing some signs of growth, new data from the Robotaxi Tracker tells a different story. The fleet is actually shrinking. The number of active unsupervised Tesla “Robotaxis” has dropped to just 20 vehicles...

item.title: Tesla patent reveals strategy for solving major Full Self-Driving, Optimus issue
item.description: A new Tesla patent that has been granted to the company this week has revealed a potential strategy for solving a major issue that could impact both the Full Self-Driving suite and Optimus. The patent, which is No. 12,636,684, describes a “Lens Cleaning System,” and was submitted by Tesla in May ...

item.title: BMW is saying goodbye to this popular gas sports car, but a new performance EV will step in
item.description: The 2027 G80 BMW M3 will be the final model year for the iconic gas-powered sports car, but a performance EV is coming soon that promises to pack even more performance. more…

item.title: Tesla Investor Shares How Retail Investors Can Participate In Blockbuster SpaceX IPO Via Robinhood, Sofi
item.description: As the Elon Musk-led commercial space flight giant SpaceX gears up for its IPO, here’s how you can participate in the listing via platforms like Robinhood Markets Inc., E-TRADE and SoFi Technologies Inc.. SpaceX IPO: What Retail Investors Need To...

item.title: Tesla Robotaxi Stumbles In Texas As Autonomy Hype Meets Rich Valuation
item.description: Tesla has begun rolling out its robotaxi service in Texas, tying a key part of its future to autonomous ride hailing. Early riders and local reports point to basic routing errors and minor low speed collisions during these first weeks of operation. These on the ground issues are emerging as Tesla...

item.title: SpaceX Starlink gets its latest airline adoptee, grabbing three of the ‘Big Four’
item.description: SpaceX’s Starlink product has just gotten its latest airline adoptee, and the move marks the successful partnership of three of the “Big Four” U.S. airlines. American Airlines announced on Tuesday that it would utilize Starlink in more than 500 narrowbody aircraft beginning in the first quarter o...

item.title: Space Stocks Soar After SpaceX Files for Record-Breaking IPO
item.description: Rocket Lab, AST SpaceMobile Rally as SpaceX IPO Excitement Builds

item.title: Fully Self-Driving Technology Positions Tesla Stock for Another Wave of Value Creation
item.description: Tesla’s fully self-driving ambitions could unlock a new phase of long-term value creation as advances in autonomous technology, robotaxis, and AI-driven mobility reshape the company’s growth outlook.

item.title: Tesla Cybertruck’s newest trim is nearing its first deliveries
item.description: Tesla Cybertruck’s newest trim level is nearing its first deliveries just a few months after being offered for an incredible deal. Back in February, Tesla officially launched a new trim of the Cybertruck, the All-Wheel-Drive, starting at just $59,990. It was a lot of truck for the money, especial...

item.title: Volvo EV drivers in Europe gain an easier way into Tesla’s Supercharger network
item.description: Volvo EV drivers will gain access to over 20,000 Tesla Supercharger stations across 29 European countries, starting later this year. But that’s not even the best part of it. more…

item.title: Tesla ships new feature that silences neighborhood Supercharger complaints
item.description: Tesla is shipping a new feature that silences neighborhood Supercharger complaints, prompting drivers to be aware of those who might be impacted by excessive noise nearby. Tesla is now rolling out a new location-specific “ Quiet Charging Zone ” that prompts drivers to lower their vehicle’s audio ...

item.title: Tesla Stock Is In A Three-Weeks-Tight, Continues Its Recovery From A Deep Slump
item.description: Tesla stock is three-weeks tight, setting up a possible early entry. Shares are up 12% this month, partially reversing a slump from earlier in the year.

item.title: Tesla unveils juicy new detail on the Roadster and hints at new unveil timeline
item.description: Tesla unveiled a juicy new detail on the Roadster, its long-delayed supercar project, and additionally hinted at a new unveiling timeline, as it appears yet another month will pass without seeing the capabilities of the vehicle. Vice President of Vehicle Engineering at Tesla, Lars Moravy, reveale...

item.title: SpaceX IPO filing reveals Mars ambitions, Grok risks and unusual spending disclosures
item.description: SpaceX’s newly released investor prospectus has offered the public its clearest look yet at the finances, ambitions and internal workings of Elon Musk’s flagship company ahead of its planned $1. 75 trillion stock market debut next month.

item.title: He Loaned Elon Musk $1 Million When Tesla Was Nearly Bankrupt — Now He’s About to Make More Than $100 Billion
item.description: Elon Musk's best friend Antonio Gracias bet early on Musk. His 7.3% SpaceX stake could soon make him one of the 50 wealthiest people alive.

item.title: SpaceX Files IPO With Tens Of Trillions At Stake
item.description: A recent episode of Moonshots with host Peter Diamandis focused on how SpaceX could become the largest IPO in financial history. SpaceX has filed paperwork for a $75 billion public offering at a valuation of $1.75 trillion. For context on scale, the panel noted the deal would be over 2.5 times la...

item.title: SpaceX IPO Filing Reveals $5 Billion Losses And $28.5 Trillion Market Vision
item.description: Elon Musk's SpaceX filing highlights major losses, governance risks and strong retail investor ambitions.

item.title: Tesla vs Nvidia: Both Market Favorites, But One Is a Best Buy Now
item.description: Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) and NVIDIA (NASDAQ: NVDA) just delivered post-earnings updates that frame the AI trade in opposite ways. Tesla is pitching a future of robots, robotaxis, and software fleets. NVIDIA is already selling the picks and shovels at scale.

item.title: The Question About Elon Musk That SpaceX Refuses to Answer Before Its IPO
item.description: There’s a question floating around the biggest IPO in history, and SpaceX has chosen its words very carefully to avoid answering it. I’ve been reading pre-IPO paperwork for nearly two decades, and what’s missing from this one tells you more than what’s in it. The company is reportedly heading to ...

item.title: Move Over, Tesla. Another Robo-Taxi Stock Is Making Progress.
item.description: Tuesday, Pony AI reported first-quarter sales of $34.3 million, up from $14 million a year ago. Wall Street was looking for $22.3 million.

item.title: Tesla Stock Trades Higher as Investors Remain Focused on SpaceX
item.description: Tesla stock is going for a second consecutive weekly gain. Shares are in the green in premarket trading Tuesday.

item.title: Honestly, the SpaceX Prospectus Is Far Worse Than I Imagined
item.description: It's hard to believe SpaceX is angling for a $1.75 trillion valuation.

item.title: Tesla's Own Auditors Say The Growth Narrative Is Currently 'Not Probable'
SpaceX Just Filed for the Biggest IPO in History -- and One Number Has Wall Street Buzzing
item.description: Elon Musk's space technology company is floating one jaw-dropping figure as it prepares for an upcoming IPO.

item.title: Charging A Volvo EV At A Tesla Supercharger In Europe Will Get Way Easier
item.description: Volvo EV owners will be able to use over 20,000 Supercharger stations without ever opening the Tesla app.

item.title: Meet the Company Taking on SpaceX and Tesla -- It Could Be Worth More Than Both Combined by 2027
item.description: Robotaxis and satellite internet are side projects to this undervalued AI giant.

item.title: Jony Ive Designed Ferrari Luce Debuts With A $640,000 Price Tag And Interiors That Drift Apart From Tesla's Screen-Heavy Approach
item.description: Ferrari N.V. (NYSE:RACE) unveiled its first fully electric car Monday, presenting the four-door Luce, designed in collaboration with former Apple Inc. (NASDAQ:AAPL) design chief Jony Ive and his collective LoveFrom, as a high-stakes bet that wealthy buyers will embrace a battery-powered Ferrari e...

item.title: NASA just gave SpaceX more crew missions because Boeing can’t certify
item.description: NASA has filed a procurement notice announcing its intent to add six post-certification missions to SpaceX’s existing Commercial Crew Transportation Capability contract. The agency said it would order up to three of those missions immediately upon adding them to the contract, with the remaining t...
